titleStmt.title: SII 24.454: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 454. (A.R. No. 8 of 1936-37.) III PRĀKĀRA, BASE OF THE VERANDAH.

summary.p: The inscription records the gift of the village Kīḻaimuṟi Marudūr in Pāchchil-kūṟṟam in Maḻai-nāḍu, a sub-division of Vaḍagarai Rājarajāvaḷanāḍu in Tiruchchirāppaḷḷi-uśāvaḍi by Viṭṭhaladēva-Mahārāja, son of Timmayadēva-Mahārāja who had obtained the village as nāyakkattaṉam from the king, for worship and offerings to god at Tiruvaraṅgam. This donor also claims to have routed Kuṟuvaṉṉiyar and restored the worship in the temple (vide No. 453 above). The date of the record, Śaka 1466, Krōdhin, Uttarāyaṇa, Ṛishabha, śu. 6, Tuesday, Magha, corresponds to 1544, A.D. May 27, Tuesday; f.d.t. ·02; f.d.n. ·19.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastuḥ . rāmāḥ kecana rejikeRead rejire raghuyadukṣmādevavamśe purā hatvā puṇyajanam vihāya karuṇām paurāṇikīm mātaram . rāmaḥ kaścana rājate śaśikulotbhūtaḥ prajā rañjayan rājā rāṣṭramarājakatvajaladhau magnam samuddhārayan . cakṣuṣmattā śamittimirā cakrapārṇyetobhūt (1) tasyaivāsīttadanusamayetāda�śīsyālavattā . ta syānṛṇyañcarammaga manmānasantatkulinam śrīraṅgarddhi m dviguṇamatanodviṭhṭhaleśānnṛpoyam . svastiśrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvirasadāśivarāyamahārāyat pṛthivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 6 10 6 Itaṉmelc cellāniṉṟa krodhisamvatsarattu Uttarāyaṇattu ṛṣabhanāyaṟṟu śukvapakṣattu ṣaṣṭiyum maṅkaḷa vāramum peṟṟa maghānakṣatrattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulāśani vaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāvitivaḷa nāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppati svapamviyaktapradhānarāna śrīraṅganāthadevarkku svastiśrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvara somakulatilakarāya Ātrayagotrabhūtarāya Āpastambasū trārtthasārtthīkaraṇasamarddharāya yajuśśākhāddhyayanāddhyavasitanididdhyāsitavyarāya Apratihatapratāpa mavikrāmtayaśomaṇḍanālamkṛtarāna Āraveṭi bukkarājasutarāmarājakumārarāya satyavratasadācārādisatguṇasampannarāna timmayadevamahārājāviṉ kumārar viḥladevamahārājark kuṟuvaṉṉiyarai Oḻittuk koyil tirukkāppu nikki hāṣṭāṅgadīrghapraṇāmapūrvvakamāka śilāśāsanam paṇṇivittapaṭi
pratidinam perumāḷ Amutuceytaruḷum Avasaram 1- kku taḷikai 10 2- kku māsam 1- kku �100 Āka varuṣam 1- kku māsam 10 2- kku poṉ 1000 2 100¥ Añcaṉakkāppukku keṟpūravilaikku nāḷ 1- kku poṉ 1 Āka varuṣam 1- kku māsam 10 2- kku nāḷ [3 100 6 10] 5- kku poṉ 3 100 6 10 5¥ periya perumāḷ māsam 1- kku cukkiṟavāram toṟum cātti Aruḷum puḻuku kāppu muṟai 4 Āka varuṣam 1- kku māsam 10 2- kku muṟai 98- kku muṟai 1- kku cātti Aruḷum pitāmpara tiruppariyaṭṭam paccaivaṭam 1- kku vilaippaṭi poṉ 4 Āka paccai vaṭam 4 10 8- kku vilaippaṭi poṉ 100 9 10 2¥ Ekāntat tirumañcaṉattukku Amutu ceytaruḷum taḷikai tiruppaṇṇiyāravakaikku vilaippaṭi poṉ 3 Āka poṉ 1000 7 100 6 10- kku polivūṭṭāka cetta grāmattukku viparam śrīmatsadāśivarāyamahārāyat namakku nāyakkattaṉattukku pālittaruḷiṉa tiruccirāppaḷḷi Ucāvaṭi vaṭakarai Irācairācavaḷanāṭṭu maḻaināṭṭup pāccilk kūṟṟattuk kiḻpalāṟṟuk kiḻaimuṟi marutūr Ūr 1- kku prākku tāṉa māṉiyam paṭṭavṛtti niṅkalāka nilam 10 8(1/2)- kku palataramum niraviṉakaiyil veli 1- kku poṉ2 10 7u 3(1/2) Āka veli 5 10 8(1/2)- kku kūṭṭiṉa poṉ1000 4 100¥ prākku Akkācci Ammaṉ periya koṇṭa Ammaṉ polivūṭṭāka palapaṭṭavṛttikkāṟar kaiyilum koṇṭu cetta Aṟuvākaranallūr yūṟkum prākku Irāma paṭṭar polivūṭṭukkuc cetta pūvvāṉūr kurukai Āṭi nirāṇikkattil kaḻittu koyilukku cettapoṉ100 6 10 Āka poṉ1000 7 100 6 10 Intap poṉ Āyirattueḻunūṟṟuaṟupatum
koṇṭu muṉ coṉṉa kaiyiṅkariyaṅkaḷ Ittaṉaiyum viṭāmal candrādityavaraiyum naṭantu varak kaṭavatākavum Inta grāmam śrīpaṇṭārattile Aṉupavikkum Iṭattu catussimān=targata nidhinikṣepajalatarupāṣāṇāti samastaprāptikaḷum Uḷḷūr tevastānamum Uḷpaṭa perumāḷ śrī paṇṭārattile tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam Āka candrādityavaraiyum taṭṭu Aṟa naṭantu varak kaṭavatākavum nivattikkaṭṭaḷaikku viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu caturtthāmśañcakku varum taḷikai 3 Intat taḷikai muṉṟum śrī vaiyiṣṇavarkaḷ Amutu ceytaruḷumpaṭikku Irāmānujakūṭattukku nivedanamum koṇṭu śrīparācarapaṭṭar cikkaiyaṅkāṟku sahirāṇyo(u)dakadhārāpūrvvakam Āka samarppittapaṭi Āle candrādityavaraiyum Ayyaṅkārvacam Ākave śrīvayiṣṇavarkaḷ Amutuceytaruḷak kaṭavatākavum . dānapālanayormmaddhye dānāt śreyonupālanam . dānāt svargamavāpnoti pālanādaccyutampadam . Inta(ta) cilāśāsanam Eḻutiṉamaikku koyil kaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇapriyyan Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 24.454 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
